details.message: reports/board/ directory is missing. Expected top-level subdirectories src/, scripts/, reports/, memory_bank/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/ all exist. reports/audit/ exists but reports/board/ does not.

reports/board/ directory is missing, which is a required governance contract path. memory_bank/ has key docs (TELEMETRY_CHANGELOG.md, systemPatterns.md, report_output_contract.md, report_retention_policy.md). .cursor/automations/ exists with README.md and 5 spec files. reports/audit/ exists.

Deprecated directory moltbot/ exists at repo root with 5 Python files: sentinel.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, board.py. This directory should have been removed per prior governance audits.

Clawdbot/Moltbot references found in code/config files (excluding docs/reports that document removal): moltbot/sentinel.py, moltbot/promotion_discipline.py, moltbot/orchestrator.py, moltbot/memory_evolution.py, moltbot/board.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py, scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/sre/run_sre_anomaly_scan.py, scripts/automations/run_governance_integrity_once.py
